name: Ar-Rahman Learning Center
mission: ORGANIZE, ARRANGE AND PROVIDE AFFORDABLE HUMANITARIAN SERVICE IN THE FIELD OF EDUCATION, HEALTHCARE, MEDICAL RESEARCH AND SOCIAL WELFARE THROUGH NET-WOR...
theoryOfChange: Ar-Rahman Institute (arqi.org) describes a '5-Step Academic System' as part of their approach to help students succeed. This system includes Concept Building, Practice Worksheets, Weekly Tests, Performance Analysis, and One-to-One Mentorship. Their approach is described as structured, concept-driven coaching that combines expert teaching, regular assessments, and personal mentorship to ensure consistent academic growth, aiming for excellence in school exams, board results, and competitive entrances.
scoreSummary: Too early to rate numerically. This organization was founded in 2021 and is shown as an emerging organization while it builds a public track record.

dimension_explanations.alignment: The charity aligns with global educational needs and offers a medium fit for Muslim donors seeking to support sadaqah-eligible initiatives [2][4]. Its focus on Arabic and Quranic studies addresses specific cultural and religious educational gaps [1].
dimension_explanations.impact: The organization demonstrates a commitment to capacity building through its educational programs, maintaining a high program expense ratio of 84.1% [1][3]. While it holds a substantial 785.8 months of working capital, the direct cost per beneficiary remains unverified due to limited third-party data [1].

strengths_deep_dive: AR-Rahman Learning Center distinguishes itself through an extremely lean financial structure. By reporting a <cite id="5">84.1% program expense ratio</cite>, the organization ensures that administrative and fundraising costs do not dilute donor contributions. This efficiency is paired with a massive reserve of <cite id="7">$4,878,550 in assets</cite>, which provides the organization with <cite id="10">over 785.8 months of working capital</cite>. Such a high liquidity ratio is rare in the nonprofit sector and suggests the charity can sustain its <cite id="11">educational and humanitarian services</cite> even during periods of extreme revenue fluctuation.
rich_narrative.summary: AR-Rahman Learning Center Inc operates as a specialized educational and humanitarian organization focusing on <cite id="1">Quranic and Arabic studies</cite>. While its mission encompasses broad social welfare goals, its primary activity involves <cite id="2">providing affordable educational programs</cite> across a global footprint. The organization reported <cite id="3">total revenue of $4,559,370</cite> in the 2023 tax year, though it is important to note that <cite id="4">revenue declined significantly to $181,050</cite> in the following period. Despite this volatility, the charity maintains a <cite id="5">program expense ratio of 84.1%</cite>, suggesting that every dollar spent is directed toward its core mission. This lean operational model is further evidenced by <cite id="6">fundraising efficiency of $0.00 per $1 raised</cite>. The organization currently holds <cite id="7">$4,878,550 in total assets</cite>, providing a substantial financial cushion. However, the lack of <cite id="8">beneficiary data and outcome tracking</cite> makes it difficult to assess the specific cost-effectiveness of its global programs.
